rows.notes: The saved plan should make the H10/H11/R8/R9/R10/H12 packet explicit before implementation closes.
The canonical driver should expose current H16, preserve H15/H14/H13/V1 state, preserve the completed H12 checkpoint, and preserve both older baselines.
README and STATUS should keep the H10/H11/R8/R9/R10/H12 checkpoint explicit even after the current public surface moves beyond it.
Publication-facing short docs should keep the H10/H11/R8/R9/R10/H12 checkpoint explicit even after later H17/H19 packets land.
The active post-H12 stage should keep outward sync routed through the release-preflight audit rather than prose-only checks.
The new packet must not weaken the prior no-widening decision.
